particulars.description: F/H property k/a land & buildings on the south side of devonshire road, little hulton, greater manchester t/no LA369289 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.

particulars.description: All interest in the interest earning deposit account and which is placed the initial deposit of £4,450.57 and the amount from time to time standing to the credit of or accruing to the deposit account. See the mortgage charge document for full details.
